name: v1alpha1HydrateOperation
description: v1alpha1HydrateOperation schema from Argo CD API

drySHA.name: DrySHA holds the resolved revision (sha) of the dry source as of the most recent reconciliation

hydratedSHA.name: HydratedSHA holds the resolved revision (sha) of the hydrated source as of the most recent reconciliation

message.name: Message contains a message describing the current status of the hydrate operation

phase.name: Phase indicates the status of the hydrate operation
